description_long: This sculpture depicts two human figures in a dramatic, dynamic pose. The dominant figure, a muscular male, stands with one arm raised, gripping an object, while the other figure crouches or kneels beneath him, partially obscured. The figures are rendered in a classical style, with detailed musculature and expressive postures, suggesting a scene of struggle or protection. The sculpture is mounted on a rectangular base, which is textured and slightly irregular, adding to the sense of movement. The surface appears to be made of weathered stone or marble, with a pale, off-white coloration and subtle patina. The overall impression is one of tension and narrative, typical of monumental public art.
description: A classical-style stone sculpture of two human figures in a dramatic, dynamic pose, with one standing and raising an arm over a crouching figure. The piece is detailed, expressive, and mounted on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the standing male figure with arm raised and the crouching figure beneath, both faces partially visible.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the muscular back of the standing figure and the bent posture of the lower figure.
description_view_2: Direct rear view focusing on the backs and legs of both figures, with the raised arm and object visible from behind.
description_view_3: Side view showing the profile of the standing figure and the crouched figure's back, emphasizing the dynamic interaction.
attribute_subject_matter: two human figures in a dramatic, classical pose
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
